title: Forever Hungry
description: Stay hungry. Eat forever. Always eat food, even if your hunger bar is full. A fork of eternal eats.
body:
# Forever Hungry
**Stay hungry. Eat forever.**

Even if your hunger bar is full, you can still eat and overstuff yourself. Already filled up on two cooked beefs? Go ahead and munch on some cake too. Swimming in Lava? Chow down a whole stack of food to stay alive.

It's configurable, too.


```
{
  "delay": 20, // How many ticks to wait between eating
  "forceDelay": false, // Enforce the delay, even when not full
  "difficultyScale": 0, // Increases the delay by a difficulty factor (delay * difficultyScale * difficulty (peaceful, easy, normal, hard, etc...)
  "foodTime": 16, // How long it takes (int ticks) to eat normal food (beef, porkchops, etc...)
  "snackTime": 8 // How long it takes (in ticks) to eat snack food (dried kelp, etc...)
}
```

Forked from [eternal eats](https://github.com/SFort/MC-eternaleats) by SFort
